title: Amma Amma Song Lyrics Uzhaippali
stanzas:
Amma Amma Song Lyrics Uzhaipali
#Ilaiyaraja #SPB #Vaali
Amma ammaa
endhan aaryuyire
kannin maniye..
dheivam neeye oh oh oh..

Amma ammaa
endhan aaryuyire
naanum neeyum
endrum orr uyire.
iru kannin maniye oh oh..
dheivam neeye oh oh..

poovizhi oram
orr thuli neerum
nee vadithaal
manam thaangaathu.

pon mugam konjam
vaadi nindraalum
naan thudippaen
vali thaazhaadhu

paththu maasam sumandhu
patta paadum marandhu
pillai selvam pirakka
alli kayyil edukka

Amma ammaa
endhan aaryuyire
naanum neeyum
endrum orr uyire.

nalla kaalam pirakka
unnai naanum arindhen
undhan kangal thirakka
ingu paadal padithaen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Amma Amma?

The music for the song was composed by the legendary composer Ilaiyaraaja.

Which movie features the song Amma Amma?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Uzhaippali, released in 1993.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Uzhaippali?

The lead roles in the movie were portrayed by Rajinikanth and Roji.

What is the theme of the song Amma Amma?

The song expresses deep emotional reverence and love, often associated with maternal affection.

Who penned the lyrics for the song Amma Amma?

The lyrics were written by the renowned lyricist Vaali.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Amma Amma from the Tamil movie Uzhaippali (1993) is a heartfelt melody that celebrates the unconditional love and sacrifice of a mother. Featuring the iconic performances of Rajinikanth and Roji, the song is beautifully composed by Ilaiyaraaja with lyrics by Vaali. Sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, it evokes deep emotions and resonates with listeners of all ages. This song remains a timeless tribute to maternal love and devotion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the heartfelt emotions of the Amma Amma song from the movie Uzhaippali. This touching melody, composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja and sung by the iconic S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, beautifully captures the essence of love and reverence. Immerse yourself in this timeless classic that continues to resonate with audiences.
stanzaMeanings: Mother, mother, you are my life, my precious jewel. You are my god, oh oh oh..
Mother, mother, you are my life, you and I are one soul. My precious jewel, oh oh.. You are my god, oh oh..
Mother, mother, you are my life.
If you shed a tear, my heart cannot bear it.
Even if your golden face frowns a little, I will not feel sad.
In the tenth month, a song is sung, and a child is born to bring wealth into the hands.
You are the mother, you have endured hardships, oh mother, you are the one who nurtures me.
Mother, mother, you are my life, you and I are one soul.
The paths change, but the mother’s love remains here.
If a little bird flies out of the nest, will the mother bird not come back?
I knew you would be born in a good time, I sang here as your eyes opened.
It is enough, enough, to be separated, oh mother, you are the one who nurtures me.
